title: Enchanting Infuser: Add Mending Enchantment
description: A datapack adding Mending to Enchanting Infuser's advanced enchanting infuser.
body: Adds the Mending Enchantment to the advanced enchantment infuser from [Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser). I made this datapack based on the similar pack [Enchanting Infuser: Add Treasure Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchanting-infuser-add-treasure-enchantments) as I only wanted the Mending Enchantment without all the other treasure enchantments.
